name: Lockfile Sync Check
description: When package.json is edited, check if a lockfile exists and warn if it may be out of sync

then.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const locks=['package-lock.json','yarn.lock','pnpm-lock.yaml'];const found=locks.filter(f=>{try{fs.statSync(f);return true}catch{return false}});if(found.length===0){console.log('WARNING: No lockfile found. Run npm install to generate one.')}else{console.log('Lockfile present: '+found.join(', ')+'. Run install if you changed dependencies.')}"
